global.description: The ad features a bright yellow background with a prominent offer and call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a 2-for-1 offer with free delivery.

elements.label: Yellow background
elements.description: A solid yellow background fills the entire canvas, providing a bright and cheerful base.

elements.label: CraveLoop logo
elements.description: A simple logo at the top, featuring the text 'CraveLoop' in a bold, modern font.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: Large, bold text in black stating '2-for-1 tonight' that stands out prominently.

elements.label: Delivery offer
elements.description: Smaller text below the main offer, reading 'Free delivery over $15' in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A bold price tag in black, displaying '€9.99' prominently to attract attention.

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A bright button at the bottom with the text 'Install now' in white on a black background.

elements.label: Decorative circles
elements.description: Three empty circles arranged horizontally, possibly representing items or options.

elements.label: Decorative circles
elements.description: Another set of empty circles, similar to the previous, adding a decorative element.

elements.label: Bottom decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element at the bottom, possibly a design feature.

elements.label: Bottom decorative element
elements.description: Another small decorative element, similar to the previous one.

elements.label: Bottom decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element on the left side at the bottom.

elements.label: Main background area
elements.description: The main area of the ad that contains the offer and CTA, with a solid yellow background.
elements.text_content: 2-for-1 tonight Free delivery over $15 €9.99 Install now

elements.label: CraveLoop logo
elements.description: The logo at the top left, featuring the brand name in a bold font.
